reportedIssues: The 'Cop the Lot' game card displays a jackpot value of '-$6,266.13' — a negative dollar amount, which is likely a data or rendering error for what should be a positive jackpot figure.

Game cards in the rightmost column of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visually clipped/cut off at the right edge of the screen, showing partial titles and images (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERA...').
The horizontal navigation pill bar at the top truncates the last visible item as 'Hot Ga...' without any indication of additional items or a scroll affordance.
The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the bottom of the scrollable content area, potentially obscuring game cards or content near the bottom of the page.

expected.reasoning: Reported issue 0 explicitly describes the 'Cop the Lot' game card displaying a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which directly matches the expected defect of a negative jackpot value.
